title: Kuma’s Promise to Bonney
description: On pages 3–5, this part focuses on Unknown person #1, Unknown person #2, Nami, Unknown person #3 as Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.
scene: Kuma’s life, Bonney’s childhood, and the cost of Saturn and the World Government’s cruelty reach their emotional center.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Three years ago - Mt. Colubo, kingdom of Goa, East Blue

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: luffy's hometown...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: GUM- GUM...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Aye!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: GAAARGH!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #1
dialogue.text: Dragon...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: You seem familiar with this island...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: Not only that, but when I went to stretch my legs earlier, I found a remote village on the outskirts...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: There was a young boy there...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: If you keep talking about this, you may as well kill me yourself.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What do you mean???

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: A child is their parent's weak spot.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: ...I'm sorry. I'll forget what I saw.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #2
dialogue.text: What an awesome finishing move!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'll save it for when I'm up against a super strong enemy!!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: After I set sail and get my crew...

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: ...I gotta be ready for when someone tries to take them away!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I won't ever let that happen! But if anyone tries it...

dialogue.speaker: Nami
dialogue.text: Monkey D. Luffy (age 16)

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: BLAM!! I'll give yem a gum-gum axe to the face!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Pretty cool, right?

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GRUNBLE!!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Don't worry, I don't eat Wimps!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: GAAW...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: The first time I was in the

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: RING RING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: RING...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Pop!!

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #3
dialogue.text: Who's there?!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: weird... what was that feeling just now? It gave me the chills.

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I bet there's still some tough opponents around here!

dialogue.speaker: Narrator
dialogue.text: I'm gonna whoop them all before I set sail!

summary: This part advances the Kuma and Bonney Flashback through 32 cleaned dialogue beats, centering the emotional stakes, battle movement, and the wider consequences of Egghead.
